about: Design recipe ledger for all mockups. Newest entries FIRST. Before building any mockup: run `node ledger-check.js` (or read the last 10 entries) — any displayFont, paletteFamily, or loaderConcept used in the last 10 entries is OFF the table for the new build. After building: append the new entry in the same commit as the mockup. Backfilled entries (pre 2026-06-09) have null block codes because the data wasn't recorded at build time.

entries.flourish: turf roll trade loader (NEW, added to loader-lab) + tri-colour division system
entries.seed: SEED - Notts Home Fix LTD, Mansfield (handyman + gardening + landscaping). Palette: white canvas, ink text, tri-trade division colours: handyman amber #d97706, garden green #2e7d4f, landscape slate #46627a. Logo is a yellow/black cartoon lion; yellow deepened to amber because white+plant-yellow AND white+ink+digger-yellow are both in last-10 cooldown. Type: Baloo 2 700/800 display (chunky, friendly, matches the lion mascot) / Inter body. Signature: tri-colour division system (3 real trades, one team) + Turf Roll trade loader, NEW concept added to loader-lab this session. Texture: paving-joint offset dashes as section dividers (the photo set is 80% paving). Voice: no owner name public; 'Got You Sorted.' tagline as CTA band; real stats 8+ yrs / 250+ jobs / 150+ customers. Ledger ok: Baloo 2 never used; palette family not in cooldown; loader 'turf roll' new; combo H1+S5+G2 clears banned list. Blocks: hero:H1 / services:S5 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R3 / trust:T1 / contact:C1. 12 real work photos from client WhatsApp.

entries.flourish: ignition trade loader + floating orange blob fields
entries.seed: SEED - Nicholas Harrap Ltd, Bexley (gas & heating, multiskilled engineers). USER-REQUESTED reuse of the standard subgas mockup template (trust-blue + flame-orange, pill buttons, blob fields, Caveat labels). Outfit is ledger-banned (last 10 + most saturated all-time) so type swaps to Figtree, the nearest rounded geometric with a 900 weight. Subgas block combo H2+S2+G2 is banned via an earlier entry, so the gallery swaps from masonry to a G1 uniform grid -> H2+S2+G1 clears. Signature: Ignition trade loader from loader-lab (pipe run draws itself, boiler flame ignites) in brand colours. Photos: Pexels stock only - boiler, gas flame, heating manifold, thermostat, radiator, plant room - strictly no people (client has no logo, no presence). Voice: Call Us CTAs (first-name preference unknown), Gas Safe front and centre, no invented 24/7 claims. NH monogram block stands in for the missing logo. Blocks: hero:H2 / trust:T2 / services:S2 / gallery:G1 / reviews:R3 / contact:C2

entries.flourish: gable-raise roofline trade loader + gable-mark SVG above every section head
entries.seed: SEED - Kind Builders, Harrow (extensions, lofts, full refurbs; existing WordPress site at new.kindbuilders.co.uk). Palette: white + kind-blue #3a87c2 accent + deep navy ink #1f3347, both straight off the logo; cool stone card surfaces. Type: League Spartan 700/800 display (first use, matches the logo's chunky condensed caps) / Inter body. Signature: NEW gable-raise loader (added to loader-lab) - three rooflines draw themselves in like the logo's triple-gable mark, wordmark lands beneath; the same gable mark repeats as a small SVG above every section head. Voice: no owner name found, 'Call us' CTAs; strapline 'Building with integrity' carried into the H1. Photos: their 4 project shots + Grimwade loft build, supplemented with 2 Pexels UK semi extension builds. Reviews: their 3 real testimonials given names/areas + 1 generated. Ledger ok: League Spartan never used, palette family new, loader concept new, H2+S1+G2 clear. Blocks: hero:H2 / trust:T1 / services:S1 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R3 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: dig-out excavator trade loader + hazard-stripe dividers
entries.seed: SEED - N.W. Contractors, South Wales (Nigel Walters, groundworks). USER-REQUESTED match to mhackett (that mockup went down a treat), so Big Shoulders Display + white+plant-yellow are deliberately reused - both clear the last-10 window anyway (mhackett dated 06-09, outside it). Gallery switched from mhackett's G2 masonry to G1 uniform grid because H1+S2+G2 is banned via trowel-legends. Signature: Dig Out trade loader (NEW, added to loader-lab) - excavator scoops the ground blocks away in three waves and the wordmark rises from the excavation. Texture: hazard-stripe dividers. Voice: Call Nigel CTAs; placeholder 07000 number, no contact data supplied. Photos: mhackett stock set reused per user instruction. Blocks: hero:H1 / trust:T1 / services:S2 / gallery:G1 / reviews:R3 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: hazard-stripe section dividers
entries.seed: SEED - Droitbuilding Ltd, Kent (general builder, Graham Bale). Palette: white + ink #14161a + digger-yellow #f7b500, site-hoarding / plant-machinery energy. Type: Anybody 700-900 display (chunky expanded grotesque, never used) / DM Sans body. Signature: crane-lift loader (NEW concept, added to loader-lab) - hook lowers the wordmark into place, settles with a bounce, releases and winches away. Texture: hazard-stripe (yellow/ink diagonal) section dividers. Voice: Call Graham CTAs; Droit = French for straight -> Built straight. Built to last. Stock photos shared with kmb-developments (which used Archivo + Manrope, both banned now, so no twinning). Ledger ok: Anybody unused; palette not in last 10; crane lift new; H7+S2+G2 combo clear. Blocks: hero:H7 / trust:T1 / services:S2 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: multi-division colour-coded cards + tipper-pour trade loader
entries.seed: SEED - AggreX Limited, Lincolnshire & East Riding (aggregates, equestrian surfaces, haulage; new business, opened April 2026). Palette: white canvas + safety-orange #f07a1d + charcoal ink from logo, family white+safety-orange+charcoal. Type: Archivo 800/900 display (0 ledger uses, haulage hoarding feel) / Inter body. Signature: multi-division colour-coded service cards (orange/plum/tan/charcoal) + product texture tiles as the gallery - they sell material so the material is the imagery. Loader: tipper pour (new concept, added to loader-lab). Voice: call-to-order, no invented trading history. Photos: Pexels stock (Euro tipper, indoor arena, aggregate textures) - client supplied only promo graphics. Blocks: hero:H2 / services:S5 / gallery:G1 / reviews:R1 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: water-fill wordmark loader + hero frame
entries.seed: SEED - MK Decor & Bathrooms, Glasgow. USER-REQUESTED CLONE of mastercraft-bathrooms (explicit instruction: 'basically the same as the MasterCraft bathrooms one'), so the ledger cooldown on Outfit and the dark-bronze palette is consciously overridden. Black + gold MK monogram logo drives the dark theme (logo dominant colour near-black, per palette rules). Rebranded: Glasgow areas, no owner name (Call us CTAs), no email (WhatsApp instead), bathrooms + painting/decorating services, marble + brushed gold photo set. Blocks: hero:H1 / services:S1 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R1 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: before/after split panels + swatch-fan trade loader
entries.seed: SEED - Casa Bijai, Glasgow (Luis Serra-Dalton, interior design + home remodelling). Palette: gallery white bg + deep verde green #1e5c40 ink/accent from the bar walls and plants, chilli-red #d6453d secondary from the striped cushion, family white+verde-green+chilli-red. Type: Bodoni Moda roman display / Figtree body. Signature: before/after split panels (living room, kitchen, bar) - transformation IS the product. Texture: paint-swatch chip strips as section markers. Loader: swatch fan (new concept, added to loader-lab). Voice: Call Luis throughout; casa means home. Ledger ok: no Bodoni/Figtree, no white+green family, no swatch loader in last 10; H2+S3+G2 combo clear. Blocks: hero:H2 / services:S3 / gallery:G2+before-after / reviews:R3 / trust:T1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: flag-joint hairline section dividers
entries.seed: SEED - Winning Creations, Paignton (builder & stonemason, Torbay / South Devon). Palette: white + cool stone canvas, petrol teal #0b5e63 accent + sandstone buff #c29a66 secondary (sea + stone, from the paving photos). Type: Gabarito 700-900 display / Inter body, chunky friendly-bold, no editorial serif. Signature: the terraced-garden job IS the hero (full-bleed H1); spirit-level loader (NEW concept, added to loader-lab) - bubble drifts, settles dead centre, vial flashes level, wordmark lands. Texture: flag-joint hairline motif on section dividers. Voice: Call Callum CTAs; est. 2016; £1m insured. Ledger ok: Gabarito never used; palette family new; spirit level new; H1+S4+G2 combo clear. Blocks: hero:H1 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: trowel-float trade loader
entries.seed: SEED - Tom Thompson Plastering, Lincoln. Palette: chalk white canvas + plaster-rose #cf8d76 accent + plum-graphite ink #322a30, family white+plaster-rose (soft dusty rose, distinct from banned burnt-orange terracotta). Type: Urbanist 700-800 display sentence case (0 ledger uses), smooth troweled feel / Inter body. Signature: Trowel Float loader, angled trowel passes sweep a rough mottled surface smooth into plaster rose, wordmark lands, new loader-lab concept. Photos: Pexels stock, no people, English-leaning (pink gypsum skim hero, ceiling roses, cornice). Voice: Call Tom / WhatsApp Tom. Ledger ok: Urbanist unused, family clear, trowel-float new, H1+S1+G1 avoids banned combo. Blocks: hero:H1 / trust:T1 / services:S1 / gallery:G1 / reviews:R3 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: slab-lay trade loader
entries.seed: SEED - DGL Home Improvements, Bristol. Palette: cool white canvas + steel-slate ink #232b39 (logo bg) + crane-gold #f0a513 CTAs + electric-blue #2b8fe8 micro-accents (dark+gold saturated, so bright canvas with slate nav). Type: Oswald 500-700 condensed caps display / Inter body, site-hoarding feel. Signature: Slab Lay trade loader, paving slabs course in offset bond across a slate screen (patios dominate the portfolio), new loader-lab concept. Texture: paving-joint offset grid on the slate CTA band. Voice: owner is Dan, Call Dan / WhatsApp Dan CTAs. Ledger ok: Oswald 0 uses all-time, palette family clear, slab-lay new. Blocks: hero:H2 / trust:T1 / services:S4 / gallery:G2 / reviews:R1 / contact:C1

entries.flourish: dry-out water-drain loader + membrane dimple dot-grid
entries.seed:
SEED - H&R Building Construction, London (basement waterproofing)
Palette:   white + cool stone canvas, H&R deep navy ink (#0a1e36 from logo) carries nav/CTAs/bands, logo gold (#c9a44e) micro-accents (ticks, amp, gauge)
Type:      Archivo 700-900 display / Inter body / IBM Plex Mono utility labels - engineered spec-sheet feel
Signature: "Dry Out" trade loader - depth gauge counts down as the flooded screen drains dry, wordmark lands (new concept, added to loader-lab)

Voice:     Ravi runs every job - "Call Ravi" CTAs; 2m/5m AXA cover quoted as hard numbers
Ledger ok: Archivo + white+navy+gold-micro not in last 10; water-drain loader new; H2+S2+G2 clear

entries.flourish: tile-lay loader + grout-gap gallery wall + tile-grid wash
entries.seed:
SEED - Expert Tiling London, North London (tiling)
Palette:   porcelain white (#fbfbfa) + cool stone (#eef0ee), terracotta-clay accent (#c2502b), ink (#191b1c), grout-grey hairlines (#dde1dc)
Type:      Geologica 600-800 display / Instrument Sans body - precise, set-square feel
Signature: everything is a tile - square-cornered cards + gallery on visible grout-gap grids, grout-line borders
Texture:   faint 72px tile-grid wash on stone sections; gallery reads as a tiled wall
Loader:    "tile lay" (NEW, added to loader-lab) - porcelain/terracotta tile grid lays in diagonally with grout gaps, brand plaque lands on the finished wall
Voice:     Pawel on the tools - "Call Pawel" CTAs, reviews name him
Ledger ok: Geologica + porcelain/terracotta + tile-lay loader + H1+S2+G2 - none in last 10
